highlights.title: Language switching and bilingual docs
highlights.description: The desktop app now supports language switching, with bilingual website docs and localized assistant persona presentations.

highlights.title: Reader chat and search
highlights.description: Reader now includes persistent chat and full-text search so you can ask follow-ups and find keywords while reading.

highlights.title: Reader toolbar and article header
highlights.description: Unified the floating reader toolbar and redesigned the article header, empty notes state, and annotation layout.

highlights.title: Settings and Library experience
highlights.description: Reworked Settings IA, added Library content-source customization, and surfaced assistant usage in stats.

highlights.title: Release-notes dialogs
highlights.description: The update flow can now show release notes for the target version and read bundled notes after update.

highlights.title: Reading and import stability
highlights.description: Fixed issues across Settings, Reader, Library covers, SQLite native roots, and import flows.
